mapper.update:
update major
major_name = #{majorName},
study_years = #{studyYears},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from major where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select m.id, m.college_id, c.college_name, m.major_code, m.major_name, m.study_years, m.status, m.create_time, m.update_time from major m left join college c on m.college_id = c.id where m.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into major
college_id, major_code, major_name, study_years, status,
values
#{collegeId}, #{majorCode}, #{majorName}, #{studyYears}, '启用',
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class WHERE major_id = #{id}
